title: The Forgotten Alioli
problem: Sub-items (modifiers) are often forgotten by busy staff.
solution: Track individual item delivery status. Any item added but not marked 'served' keeps table in 'Hungry' state.

title: The Second Drink Alert
problem: Revenue loss from missed re-order opportunities.
solution: Detect when table has had Beverage but no Interaction for >15m. Prompt 'Check for Refill'.

title: Pre-Opening Simulator
problem: Restaurants open with wrong model for location.
solution: Input: Location, Staff, Concept. Output: Viability Score and Risk warnings.

title: The Silent Signal
problem: Customers waving hands to get attention is humiliating.
solution: QR Code 'Call Waiter' button that changes table state to 'Signaling' (Blue) on staff dashboard without loud alarm.
